svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="5"> <diagram id="diag_ja_biztown_3.0_—_aks_autoscali" name="JA BizTown 3.0 — AKS Autoscaling Strategy"> <mxGraphModel dx="1106" dy="762" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="30" width="854" height="468" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_trigger" value="Scale Trigger Layer" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="3" width="850" height="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_mon2" value="Azure Monitor
(CPU / Memory Metrics)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.monitor;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_trigger" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="9" y="35" width="161" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_keda" value="KEDA (Event-Driven
Autoscaler)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_trigger" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="236" y="30" width="154" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_hpa" value="Horizontal Pod Autoscaler
(HPA — Pod Level)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_trigger" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="466" y="31" width="163" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_ca" value="Cluster Autoscaler
(Node Level)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_trigger" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="647" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_aks2" value="AKS Cluster — Simulation Namespace" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="2" y="168" width="850" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_pods" value="Active Pods (x3 per service)
Payment / CMS / Auth / Analytics" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.aks;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_aks2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="40" width="395" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_scale_out" value="Scale-Out Pods
(Peak Load +N replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_aks2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="435" y="40" width="190" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_ns" value="Namespace Isolation
per JA Area" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f4cccc;strokeColor=#cc0000;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_aks2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="120" width="200" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_rbac" value="RBAC + Network Policy
(Pod-to-Pod Firewall)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f4cccc;strokeColor=#cc0000;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_aks2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="120" width="200" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tb_aks" value="" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;fillColor=none;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry y="170" width="854" height="164" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tb_aks_box" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;fillColor=none;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry y="188" width="854" height="142" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_infra" value="Node Infrastructure Layer" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="2" y="358" width="850" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_n1" value="System Node Pool
(Standard_D4s_v5)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_infra" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_n2" value="User Node Pool
(Standard_D8s_v5 — Burstable)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_infra" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="239" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_spots" value="Spot Node Pool
(Cost-Optimized — Non-critical)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_infra" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_vnet2" value="Azure VNet Integration
(Private Subnets)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.virtual_networks;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_infra" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="645" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" value="Emit Scale
Events" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_mon2" target="n_keda" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="CPU Threshold
Trigger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_mon2" target="n_hpa" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="192" y="69" /> <mxPoint x="192" y="118" /> <mxPoint x="459" y="118" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="Coordinated
Scale Signal" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_keda" target="n_hpa" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="Scale Pods
Horizontally" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_hpa" target="n_pods" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="632" y="91" /> <mxPoint x="647" y="91" /> <mxPoint x="647" y="148" /> <mxPoint x="2" y="148" /> <mxPoint x="2" y="238" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="Add Replicas" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_hpa" target="n_scale_out" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="632" y="91" /> <mxPoint x="647" y="91" /> <mxPoint x="647" y="158" /> <mxPoint x="417" y="158" /> <mxPoint x="417" y="238" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" value="Provision
New Node" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_ca" target="n_n2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="743" y="118" /> <mxPoint x="842" y="118" /> <mxPoint x="842" y="278" /> <mxPoint x="232" y="278" /> <mxPoint x="232" y="421" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" value="Scheduled on
System Node" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_pods" target="n_n1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" value="Scheduled on
User Node" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="71p0qRHT2vT5wwem8O0j-2" source="n_scale_out" target="n_n2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="532" y="348" /> <mxPoint x="330" y="348" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
